window.__nearestIdxAny = function(arr, v) {
  if (!Array.isArray(arr) || arr.length === 0 || v == null || !Number.isFinite(v)) return -1;
  let best = 0, bestD = Math.abs(arr[0] - v);
  for (let i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
    const d = Math.abs(arr[i] - v);
    if (d < bestD) { best = i; bestD = d; }
  }
  return best; // first match wins on ties
};

window.__tfdCumTimeExact = function(pressAltFt, tempC, weightLb) {
  const d = window.__TFD_EXACT;
  if (!d || pressAltFt == null || tempC == null || weightLb == null) return null;
  const it = window.__nearestIdxAny(d.temps, tempC);
  const ia = window.__nearestIdxAny(d.alts, pressAltFt);
  if (it < 0 || ia < 0) return null;
  const s1 = d.grid1[it] && d.grid1[it][ia];
  if (s1 == null || !Number.isFinite(s1)) return null;
  const is1 = window.__nearestIdxAny(d.stage1axis, s1);
  const iw = window.__nearestIdxAny(d.weights, weightLb);
  if (is1 < 0 || iw < 0) return null;
  let t = d.grid2[is1] && d.grid2[is1][iw];
  if (t == null || !Number.isFinite(t)) return null;
  t = Math.max(0, Math.min(t, 13500));
  return t;
};

window.__tfdCumFuelExact = function(timeMin) {
  if (timeMin == null || !Number.isFinite(timeMin)) return null;
  return 0.002*Math.pow(timeMin,3) - 0.2524*Math.pow(timeMin,2) + 16.858*timeMin + 1.0903;
};

window.__tfdCumDistExact = function(timeMin) {
  if (timeMin == null || !Number.isFinite(timeMin)) return null;
  return 0.0065*Math.pow(timeMin,2) + 2.713*timeMin + 0.3566;
};

window.calcTFDSegmentFromInit = function(initAltFt, targetAltFt, takeoffTempC, takeoffAltFt, takeoffWeightLb, iceVanesYes) {
  if (initAltFt == null || targetAltFt == null || takeoffTempC == null || takeoffAltFt == null || takeoffWeightLb == null) {
    return {time:null,fuel:null,dist:null};
  }
  const baseTemp = takeoffTempC + (iceVanesYes ? 20 : 0);
  const tInit = baseTemp - 2 * ((initAltFt - takeoffAltFt) / 1000);
  const tTgt  = baseTemp - 2 * ((targetAltFt - takeoffAltFt) / 1000);
  const cumTimeInit = window.__tfdCumTimeExact(initAltFt, tInit, takeoffWeightLb);
  const cumTimeTgt  = window.__tfdCumTimeExact(targetAltFt, tTgt, takeoffWeightLb);
  if (cumTimeInit == null || cumTimeTgt == null) return {time:null,fuel:null,dist:null};
  const segTime = Math.max(0, cumTimeTgt - cumTimeInit);
  const cumFuelInit = window.__tfdCumFuelExact(cumTimeInit);
  const cumFuelTgt  = window.__tfdCumFuelExact(cumTimeTgt);
  const segFuel = (cumFuelInit == null || cumFuelTgt == null) ? null : Math.max(0, cumFuelTgt - cumFuelInit);
  const cumDistInit = window.__tfdCumDistExact(cumTimeInit);
  const cumDistTgt  = window.__tfdCumDistExact(cumTimeTgt);
  const segDist = (cumDistInit == null || cumDistTgt == null) ? null : Math.max(0, cumDistTgt - cumDistInit);
  return {time:segTime, fuel:segFuel, dist:segDist};
};

// Replace the active derived-field path so Cruise Start Weight uses exact workbook climb fuel.
calculateDerivedFields = function() {
  for (let leg = 1; leg <= 4; leg++) {
    const L = `l${leg}_`;
    const origin_elev = getVal(L + 'origin_elev');
    const altimeter   = getVal(L + 'altimeter');
    if (origin_elev !== null && altimeter !== null) {
      setField(L + 'press_alt', Math.round(origin_elev + (29.92 - altimeter) * 1000));
    }
    const press_alt = getVal(L + 'press_alt');
    if (press_alt !== null) setField(L + 'co_init_alt', press_alt);

    const dest_elev = getVal(L + 'dest_elev');
    const ldg_alt   = getVal(L + 'ldg_altimeter');
    if (dest_elev !== null && ldg_alt !== null) {
      setField(L + 'ldg_press_alt', Math.round(dest_elev + (29.92 - ldg_alt) * 1000));
    }

    const cruise_alt        = getVal(L + 'cruise_alt');
    const temp_to           = getVal(L + 'temp_to');
    const cruise_manual_oat = getVal(L + 'cruise_manual_oat');
    if (cruise_alt !== null && temp_to !== null && origin_elev !== null) {
      if (cruise_manual_oat !== null) {
        setField(L + 'cruise_oat', 'Manual Input Below');
      } else {
        const est_oat = temp_to - ((cruise_alt - origin_elev) / 1000) * 2;
        setField(L + 'cruise_oat', est_oat.toFixed(1));
      }
      const eff_oat = (cruise_manual_oat !== null) ? cruise_manual_oat : (temp_to - ((cruise_alt - origin_elev) / 1000) * 2);
      const man_isa_el = document.getElementById(L + 'cruise_manual_isa');
      const man_isa    = man_isa_el ? man_isa_el.value : '';
      if (man_isa !== '') {
        setField(L + 'cruise_isa', 'Manual Input Below');
      } else {
        const isa_std = 15 - (cruise_alt / 1000) * 2;
        const isa_dev = eff_oat - isa_std;
        setField(L + 'cruise_isa', `ISA${isa_dev >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${Math.round(isa_dev)}`);
      }

      const tow = getVal(L + 'tow');
      const pa  = getVal(L + 'press_alt');
      const iceYes = (getStr(L + 'ice_vanes') === 'Yes');
      if (tow !== null && pa !== null) {
        if (cruise_alt > pa) {
          const seg = window.calcTFDSegmentFromInit(pa, cruise_alt, temp_to, pa, tow, iceYes);
          setField(L + 'cruise_start_wt', (seg && seg.fuel != null) ? Math.round(tow - seg.fuel) : '');
        } else {
          setField(L + 'cruise_start_wt', Math.round(tow));
        }
      }
    }
  }
};
